_readme: Ledger de xuat CHO NGUOI DUYET. Bot: doc moi run, render muc '⏳ CHỜ DUYỆT' cuoi B1 (kem so ngay den kill_date). Bot duoc ADD item pending moi (moi y 🟢 co de xuat can duyet), duoc cap nhat last_rescore/score, KHONG BAO GIO tu chuyen sang decided. Qua kill_date chua co quyet dinh -> bot chuyen sang decided voi status EXPIRED + ghi chu trong B1. Nguoi duyet: sua status thanh APPROVED/REJECTED + them note roi push.
